title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-config-algolia to v13
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [eslint-config-algolia](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia) from `v12.0.0` to `v13.0.1`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v13.0.0`](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1300httpsgithubcomalgoliaeslint-config-algoliacomparev1100v1300-2017-11-25)

##### Bug Fixes

* **deps:** update dependency react to v^16.0.0 ([52f6213](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/52f6213))
##### Features

* **jest:** move into its own file ([2259ed6](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/2259ed6))
* **react:** disallow binding in render ([a1d725a](https://github.com/algolia/eslint-config-algolia/commit/a1d725a))

---

</details>
